item.title:
fc_mossman: Spencer Mossman @fc_mossman · 4min Mathys Detourbet, data report
high involvement, create first winger
+ pretty ridi
item.description:
Spencer Mossman @fc_mossman · 4min Mathys Detourbet, data report
high involvement, create first winger
+ pretty ridiculous creative profile; volume and quality of chances, accuracy of crosses, all while coming as a right-footed (albeit good with his left) winger playing off the left + super involved in Mostrar más Cita Transfer News Live @DeadlineDayLive · 4h Manchester City are close to securing are move for Mathys Detourbet from Troyes for around €15M.
Detourbet has visited City’s facilities, with the club holding a clear advantage due to Troyes’ links to the City Football Group.
He's likely to be loaned back to Troyes for 1 2 1 359
